kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.
kw.msg: Opening browser 'chrome' to base url 'https://qa-ux.linx.com.br/3.12/Account/Login/'.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.
kw.msg: Typing text 'desenv.franqueado' into text field 'id:UserName'.

kw.name: Input Password
kw.doc: Types the given password into the text field identified by ``locator``.
kw.msg: Typing password into text field 'id:Password'.
Temporally setting log level to: NONE
Log level changed from NONE to INFO.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.
kw.msg: Clicking button 'id:btnSubmit'.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.
kw.msg: Slept 20 seconds

test.name: Cenário 2: Acessar tela Romaneio

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.
kw.msg: Clicking element '//div[@id="menu-search"]'.

test.name: Cenário 3: Criar novo registro

test.name: Cenário 8: Salvar e Emitir NFe

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.
kw.msg: Clicking element '//a[@title="Salvar"]'.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: retornar a aba Dados da nota fiscal

errors.msg: Error in file 'C:\Users\luiz.hsantos\OneDrive - Linx SA\QA_INOVACAO\Estudos\Projetos automação\Aula-Robot2\Testes\Romaneio_saida.robot' on line 3: Invalid resource file extension '.py'.
